title: dryopteris ascensionis
intro: Dryopteris ascensionis, also known as the Ascension fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Ascension Island. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The Ascension fern has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
